data.title: Ethena withdrew $7.05 million in ENA from Bybit, and now holds ENA worth a total of $100 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Ethena (0x631...e3ae) withdrew 25 million ENA from Bybit, worth $7.05 million. The wallet currently holds a total of 355.15 million ENA, worth $100.13 million.

data.title: Can Bitcoin Price Hit $110K in December? Know All Here
data.description:
Key Insights: The investors are keeping close track of the Bitcoin USD movements, as the crypto consolidates near the $91,500 mark. This marks a strong recovery of the asset from last week’s massive dump to $80,000, which has triggered a bearish Bitcoin price prediction.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/28/can-bitcoin-usd-price-hit-110k-in-december/

data.title: Bitcoin's Potential Growth Amid Current Economic Conditions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bitwise cryptocurrency researcher André Dragosch has highlighted that Bitcoin is currently facing a macroeconomic environment similar to that during the COVID-19 pandemic. He noted that the scale of previous monetary stimulus suggests an accelerated global growth expectation, indicating that this growth momentum could continue until 2026. Dragosch believes that Bitcoin's current price does not align with the future macroeconomic outlook, suggesting significant potential for price increases.

data.title: Tether Shuts Down Uruguay Bitcoin Mining Unit After Power Dispute Escalates
data.description:
Tether has halted its Bitcoin mining operations in Uruguay after an extended dispute with the state electricity provider, UTE, made the project financially unsustainable. The company confirmed on November 28, 2025, that the suspension includes shutting down facilities and laying off 30 of its 38 employees in the country.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tether-shuts-down-uruguay-bitcoin-mining-unit-after-power-dispute-escalates/

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Inflows
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on November 28 (Eastern Time), Solana spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $5.37 million. The Grayscale SOL ETF (GSOL) led the inflows with $4.33 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $77.83 million. Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL) followed with a net inflow of $2.42 million, accumulating a historical total net inflow of $32.30 million. Conversely, 21Shares SOL ETF (TSOL) experienced a net outflow of $1.38 million, with its historical total net outflow reaching $27.60 million. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs stands at $888 million, with a Solana net asset ratio of 1.15% and a historical cumulative net inflow of $619 million.

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $5.37 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $5.37 million yesterday (November 28th, Eastern Time). The SOL spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale SOL ETF (GSOL), with a net inflow of $4.33 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $77.83 million. This was followed by the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL), with a net inflow of $2.42 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $32.3 million. The 21Shares SOL ETF (TSOL) experienced a single-day net outflow of $1.38 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $27.6 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $888 million, a net asset value ratio of 1.15%, and a cumulative net inflow of $619 million.

data.title: Metis, Derive, and Mantle Lead November’s Layer-2 Surge as Activity Accelerates
data.description:
Layer-2 networks posted one of their strongest months of 2025, with explosive growth across emerging platforms and steady expansion among established rollups. New data highlights a broad acceleration in transaction activity, signaling rising adoption in DeFi, gaming, social applications, and cross-chain communication.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/metis-derive-and-mantle-lead-novembers-layer-2-surge-as-activity-accelerates/

data.title: Japan draws closer to overhauling its crypto rulework
data.description:
Japan is gearing up for a major crypto regulatory reset. The Financial Services Agency (FSA) is deliberating on a legal amendment that could reclassify crypto from a payment tool to a “financial product” in order to boost investor protection amid crypto accounts quadrupling over five years. On November 26, the FSA working group reviewing crypto […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-overhauls-crypto-rulework/

data.title: Circle has minted another 500 million USDC, bringing the total issuance with Tether to $18.25 billion since October 11.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Circle has just minted another 500 million USDC. Data shows that since the market correction on October 11th, Tether and Circle, the two major stablecoin issuers, have cumulatively minted stablecoins worth a total of $18.25 billion. Large-scale stablecoin minting is often interpreted by the market as a potential signal of capital inflows or increased purchasing power.

data.title: LBank launches a zero-fee spot trading promotion, simultaneously offering a 100% enhanced bonus.
data.description: According to official sources, LBank launched its zero-fee spot trading promotion on November 29th. During the promotion period, all spot trading pairs on the platform are free of charge. Furthermore, users who deposit funds into their contract accounts during the promotion period can receive a 100% enhanced bonus, achieving the double benefit of "zero fees + deposit rewards".

data.title: Ethereum tripling its gas limit is the ‘floor, we can go higher’ — Sassano
data.description:
Ethereum educator Anthony Sassano said Ethereum’s gas limit could climb beyond three times next year, with some developers pushing for a fivefold increase.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-gas-limit-increase-transactions-fees-anthony-sassano?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fttl%3D0%26__%3D1764383828632&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase includes Rayls (RLS) in its listing roadmap
data.description: According to official sources, Coinbase has added Rayls (RLS) to its listing roadmap. The actual trading launch date will be announced later, pending the completion of market-making support and technical integration.

data.title: An address deposited 5,000 ETH into Binance, bringing the total deposits over the past two weeks to over 13,400 ETH.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address that bought WBTC at a low price four years ago and took profits at a high price in July this year (profiting $107 million) deposited 5,000 ETH into Binance 10 hours ago, worth approximately $15.36 million. This address has cumulatively deposited 13,403.28 ETH into exchanges over the past two weeks, with a total value of $41.06 million. Currently, this address still holds 15,000 ETH and has interactions with addresses associated with Galaxy Digital; the ownership of the wallet cannot be confirmed at this time.
